# services.scollector

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.scollector`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.scollector.bosunHost` | `string` | Host and port of the bosun server that will store the collected data. |
| `services.scollector.collectors` | `attribute set of list of absolute path` | An attribute set mapping the frequency of collection to a list of binaries that should be executed at that frequency. You can use "0" to run a binary forever. |
| `services.scollector.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to run scollector. |
| `services.scollector.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra scollector configuration added to the end of scollector.toml |
| `services.scollector.extraOpts` | `list of string` | Extra scollector command line options |
| `services.scollector.group` | `string` | Group account under which scollector runs. |
| `services.scollector.package` | `package` | The scollector package to use. |
| `services.scollector.user` | `string` | User account under which scollector runs. |
